name: Padley Momentum
description: Trend-following with capital preservation, inspired by Marcus Padley / Marcus Today.
methodology: Screen by earnings momentum + ROE, rank by 12-month price momentum. Risk-off signal: go to cash when ASX 200 breaks below 200-day MA.

name: Damodaran Intrinsic Value
description: DCF valuation with narrative-to-numbers approach, inspired by Aswath Damodaran.
methodology: Simplified DCF for ASX stocks. Score by discount-to-intrinsic-value. Supplemented by relative valuation (P/E, EV/EBITDA vs peers).

name: Quantitative Factors
description: Multi-factor model ranking stocks by value, momentum, quality, and low volatility.
methodology: Rank by: value (low P/B), momentum (12-1 month returns), quality (high ROE, low debt), low volatility. Equal-weight top-ranked.

name: Dividend Income
description: High-yield dividend strategy with franking credit advantage.
methodology: Rank by grossed-up yield (including franking), filter by payout ratio <80%, DPS growth >0 over 3yr, FCF coverage >1.2x.

name: Contrarian Deep Value
description: Graham/Buffett-style value investing seeking stocks below intrinsic value.
methodology: Graham Number screen: sqrt(22.5 x EPS x BVPS) > current price. Filter P/B <1, current ratio >1.5, 5yr positive earnings.
